content.body:
I don't much care about https://github.com/tc39/ecmarkup/pull/694/changes#r3530802437 , but I'd like to resolve it quickly so we can merge the PR and cut an ecmarkup release. So, who would like to weigh in on how `setMultipagePreference` ought to be wired to `#shortcuts-help`?
1. in multipage.js, as a listener on `document` with runtime filtering
2. in multipage.js, as a listener on `#shortcuts-help` that is dynamically added either immediately if that container already exists or in a DOMContentLoaded callback otherwise
3. in Spec.ts as an inline script element accompanying `#shortcuts-help`
content.formatted_body:
I don't much care about https://github.com/tc39/ecmarkup/pull/694/changes#r3530802437 , but I'd like to resolve it quickly so we can merge the PR and cut an ecmarkup release. So, who would like to weigh in on how setMultipagePreference ought to be wired to #shortcuts-help?

  1. in multipage.js, as a listener on document with runtime filtering
  2. in multipage.js, as a listener on #shortcuts-help that is dynamically added either immediately if that container already exists or in a DOMContentLoaded callback otherwise
  3. in Spec.ts as an inline script element accompanying #shortcuts-help
